scripts.build: pnpm --filter @rr/shared build && pnpm --filter @rr/workers build && pnpm --filter @rr/frontend build
scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply reduced-recipes-prod --config packages/workers/wrangler.api.toml
scripts.db:migrate:preview: wrangler d1 migrations apply reduced-recipes-preview --config packages/workers/wrangler.api.toml --env preview
